mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wm_refresh_token (user_id, jti_hash, issued_at, expires_at, user_agent, ip_addr) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jtiHash}, #{issuedAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{userAgent}, #{ipAddr})
mapper.select: SELECT rt_id, user_id, jti_hash, issued_at, expires_at, revoked_at, replaced_by, user_agent, ip_addr, created_at FROM wm_refresh_token WHERE jti_hash = #{jtiHash} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE wm_refresh_token SET revoked_at = NOW() WHERE jti_hash = #{jtiHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL
UPDATE wm_refresh_token SET revoked_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, USER_NAME, PASSWORD_HASH, ROLE, USE_YN FROM WM_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, USER_NAME, ROLE FROM WM_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
